title: Woman in Chains
writer: Henri-Georges Clouzot, Monique Lange, Marcel Moussy
actors: Laurent Terzieff, Elisabeth Wiener, Bernard Fresson
plot: Stanislas Hassler blazes the development of modern art in his gallery, packed with works of surprising shapes, colours and textures, and where exhibitions turn into media events. Gilbert Moreau is one of the artists whose sculptur...
